input:
Senior Site Reliability Engineer
Fully remote within EU

We're a stealth-mode startup in the climate tech space. Looking for an experienced SRE to be one of our first engineering hires.

Stack:
- Go
- Kubernetes
- Terraform
- PostgreSQL
- Prometheus + Grafana

Requirements:
- 6+ years operating production systems
- Deep Kubernetes experience
- Comfortable with terraform and cloud cost optimisation

What you'll do:
- Build out our SRE practice from scratch
- Define our SLOs and oncall rotations
- Mentor backend engineers on operational concerns

Compensation: TBD based on candidate.
